id.COMMENT: Unique identifier for this user or bot

is_bot.COMMENT: True, if this user is a bot

language_code.COMMENT: IETF language tag of the user's language

type.COMMENT: Type of chat, can be either private, group, supergroup or channel

title.COMMENT: Title, for supergroups, channels and group chats

username.COMMENT: Username, for private chats, supergroups and channels if available

first_name.COMMENT: First name of the other party in a private chat

last_name.COMMENT: Last name of the other party in a private chat

all_members_are_administrators.COMMENT: True if a all members of this group are admins

old_id.COMMENT: Unique chat identifier, this is filled when a group is converted to a supergroup

chat_type.COMMENT: Optional. Type of the chat, from which the inline query was sent.

result_id.COMMENT: The unique identifier for the result that was chosen

user_id.COMMENT: The user that chose the result

location.COMMENT: Sender location, only for bots that require user location

inline_message_id.COMMENT: Identifier of the sent inline message

query.COMMENT: The query that was used to obtain the result

sender_chat_id.COMMENT: Sender of the message, sent on behalf of a chat

date.COMMENT: Date the message was sent in timestamp format

forward_from.COMMENT: Unique user identifier, sender of the original message

forward_from_chat.COMMENT: Unique chat identifier, chat the original message belongs to

forward_from_message_id.COMMENT: Unique chat identifier of the original message in the channel

forward_signature.COMMENT: For messages forwarded from channels, signature of the post author if present

forward_sender_name.COMMENT: Sender's name for messages forwarded from users who disallow adding a link to their account in forwarded messages

forward_date.COMMENT: date the original message was sent in timestamp format

reply_to_message.COMMENT: Message that this message is reply to

via_bot.COMMENT: Optional. Bot through which the message was sent

edit_date.COMMENT: Date the message was last edited in Unix time

media_group_id.COMMENT: The unique identifier of a media message group this message belongs to

author_signature.COMMENT: Signature of the post author for messages in channels

text.COMMENT: For text messages, the actual UTF-8 text of the message max message length 4096 char utf8mb4

entities.COMMENT: For text messages, special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the text

caption_entities.COMMENT: For messages with a caption, special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the caption

audio.COMMENT: Audio object. Message is an audio file, information about the file

document.COMMENT: Document object. Message is a general file, information about the file

animation.COMMENT: Message is an animation, information about the animation

game.COMMENT: Game object. Message is a game, information about the game

photo.COMMENT: Array of PhotoSize objects. Message is a photo, available sizes of the photo

sticker.COMMENT: Sticker object. Message is a sticker, information about the sticker

video.COMMENT: Video object. Message is a video, information about the video

voice.COMMENT: Voice Object. Message is a Voice, information about the Voice

video_note.COMMENT: VoiceNote Object. Message is a Video Note, information about the Video Note

caption.COMMENT: For message with caption, the actual UTF-8 text of the caption

contact.COMMENT: Contact object. Message is a shared contact, information about the contact

location.COMMENT: Location object. Message is a shared location, information about the location

venue.COMMENT: Venue object. Message is a Venue, information about the Venue

poll.COMMENT: Poll object. Message is a native poll, information about the poll

dice.COMMENT: Message is a dice with random value from 1 to 6

new_chat_members.COMMENT: List of unique user identifiers, new member(s) were added to the group, information about them (one of these members may be the bot itself)

left_chat_member.COMMENT: Unique user identifier, a member was removed from the group, information about them (this member may be the bot itself)

new_chat_title.COMMENT: A chat title was changed to this value

new_chat_photo.COMMENT: Array of PhotoSize objects. A chat photo was change to this value

delete_chat_photo.COMMENT: Informs that the chat photo was deleted

group_chat_created.COMMENT: Informs that the group has been created

supergroup_chat_created.COMMENT: Informs that the supergroup has been created

channel_chat_created.COMMENT: Informs that the channel chat has been created

message_auto_delete_timer_changed.COMMENT: MessageAutoDeleteTimerChanged object. Message is a service message: auto-delete timer settings changed in the chat

migrate_to_chat_id.COMMENT: Migrate to chat identifier. The group has been migrated to a supergroup with the specified identifier

migrate_from_chat_id.COMMENT: Migrate from chat identifier. The supergroup has been migrated from a group with the specified identifier

pinned_message.COMMENT: Message object. Specified message was pinned

invoice.COMMENT: Message is an invoice for a payment, information about the invoice

successful_payment.COMMENT: Message is a service message about a successful payment, information about the payment

connected_website.COMMENT: The domain name of the website on which the user has logged in.

proximity_alert_triggered.COMMENT: Service message. A user in the chat triggered another user's proximity alert while sharing Live Location.

voice_chat_scheduled.COMMENT: VoiceChatScheduled object. Message is a service message: voice chat scheduled

voice_chat_started.COMMENT: VoiceChatStarted object. Message is a service message: voice chat started

voice_chat_ended.COMMENT: VoiceChatEnded object. Message is a service message: voice chat ended

voice_chat_participants_invited.COMMENT: VoiceChatParticipantsInvited object. Message is a service message: new participants invited to a voice chat

reply_markup.COMMENT: Inline keyboard attached to the message

edit_date.COMMENT: Date the message was edited in timestamp format

text.COMMENT: For text messages, the actual UTF-8 text of the message max message length 4096 char utf8

entities.COMMENT: For text messages, special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the text

caption.COMMENT: For message with caption, the actual UTF-8 text of the caption

inline_message_id.COMMENT: Identifier of the message sent via the bot in inline mode, that originated the query

chat_instance.COMMENT: Global identifier, uniquely corresponding to the chat to which the message with the callback button was sent

data.COMMENT: Data associated with the callback button

game_short_name.COMMENT: Short name of a Game to be returned, serves as the unique identifier for the game

total_amount.COMMENT: Total price in the smallest units of the currency

shipping_option_id.COMMENT: Identifier of the shipping option chosen by the user

order_info.COMMENT: Order info provided by the user

total_voter_count.COMMENT: Total number of users that voted in the poll

is_closed.COMMENT: True, if the poll is closed

is_anonymous.COMMENT: True, if the poll is anonymous

type.COMMENT: Poll type, currently can be “regular” or “quiz”

allows_multiple_answers.COMMENT: True, if the poll allows multiple answers

correct_option_id.COMMENT: 0-based identifier of the correct answer option. Available only for polls in the quiz mode, which are closed, or was sent (not forwarded) by the bot or to the private chat with the bot.

explanation.COMMENT: Text that is shown when a user chooses an incorrect answer or taps on the lamp icon in a quiz-style poll, 0-200 characters

explanation_entities.COMMENT: Special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the explanation

open_period.COMMENT: Amount of time in seconds the poll will be active after creation

close_date.COMMENT: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the poll will be automatically closed

user_id.COMMENT: The user, who changed the answer to the poll

option_ids.COMMENT: 0-based identifiers of answer options, chosen by the user. May be empty if the user retracted their vote.

user_id.COMMENT: Performer of the action, which resulted in the change

date.COMMENT: Date the change was done in Unix time

old_chat_member.COMMENT: Previous information about the chat member

new_chat_member.COMMENT: New information about the chat member

invite_link.COMMENT: Chat invite link, which was used by the user to join the chat; for joining by invite link events only

message_id.COMMENT: New incoming message of any kind - text, photo, sticker, etc.

edited_message_id.COMMENT: New version of a message that is known to the bot and was edited

channel_post_id.COMMENT: New incoming channel post of any kind - text, photo, sticker, etc.

edited_channel_post_id.COMMENT: New version of a channel post that is known to the bot and was edited

chosen_inline_result_id.COMMENT: The result of an inline query that was chosen by a user and sent to their chat partner

shipping_query_id.COMMENT: New incoming shipping query. Only for invoices with flexible price

pre_checkout_query_id.COMMENT: New incoming pre-checkout query. Contains full information about checkout

poll_id.COMMENT: New poll state. Bots receive only updates about polls, which are sent or stopped by the bot

poll_answer_poll_id.COMMENT: A user changed their answer in a non-anonymous poll. Bots receive new votes only in polls that were sent by the bot itself.

my_chat_member_updated_id.COMMENT: The bot's chat member status was updated in a chat. For private chats, this update is received only when the bot is blocked or unblocked by the user.

chat_member_updated_id.COMMENT: A chat member's status was updated in a chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat and must explicitly specify “chat_member” in the list of allowed_updates to receive these updates.

inline_message_id.COMMENT: Identifier of the sent inline message
